---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behaviour
labels: bug
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Include any error messages, stack traces, or screenshots.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| PHP version | e.g. 8.5.3 |
| Laravel version | e.g. 12.x |
| Node version | e.g. 20.x |
| OS | e.g. Ubuntu 22.04 |
| Browser (if UI bug) | e.g. Chrome 123 |

## Additional context

Any other context about the problem (logs, related issues, etc.).
